notes: Dual-hardness armor steel per MIL-A-46099C (US) or similar. Hard 600+BHN face on ductile softer backer (~350-400 BHN). Face hardness defeats projectile while backer absorbs energy. ARL shows V50 15-25% above RHA. Used in M2 Bradley, Stryker applique. Reduced risk of through-thickness cracking vs monolithic HHA.

source.methodology: RHAe from ARL published V50 data on dual-hardness steel: 15-25% above RHA → RHAe~1.1-1.25. Construction per MIL-A-46099C specification.
